visa_types.name: Medical treatment
visa_types.documents_required:
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/eth/en/ita/travel-insurance)
Click here to download the list of documents required
Kindly note:
- Personal appearance of applicant is required.
- All documents must be submitted in original as well as in a clear photocopy at the time of making an application.
ALL PASSPORTS MUST BE IN GOOD CONDITIONS. ALTERATED, DAMAGED AND/OR COUNTERFEITED PASSPORTS WITH MISSING PAGES WILL NOT BE ACCEPTED.
PASSPORT MUST HAVE:
- AT LEAST TWO BLANK PAGES
- A VALIDITY PERIOD THAT EXCEEDS OF AT LEAST THREE (3) MONTHS THE DATE OF DEPARTURE FROM THE SCHENGEN AREA
visa_types.visa_fees:
The Embassy of Italy in Addis Ababa:

[Table:   Business ]
Visa Fees and VFS Service Fees to be paid in Cash / POS at the Cashier counter at the Visa Application Centre before submitting your visa application.

[Table:   Business ]
Applicants will be required to Pay their fees (a deposit of the Embassy Visa Fees) and upon confirmation of the amount payable by the VFS Counter Staff and after completion of document checks, at the Cashier counter at the Visa Application Centre
You must pay the VFS service fee online with a credit or debit card to confirm your appointment.
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee is as per the current exchange rate and it is subject to change. All the fees are non-refundable and non - transferable.
- The Visa Fees are payable only by Cash / POS/ Telebirr in Ethiopian Birr at the Cashier Counter in the Visa Application Centre
visa_types.processing_time:
You need to submit your application in good time before travelling. According to article 9 section 1 in the visa code, EU 2019/1155, you should apply not less than 15 days before the planned visit begins. The 15 days is counted from when the application is received by the Embassy of Italy in Addis Ababa Ethiopia. Consequently, you must calculate with the transportation time when planning for your submission.
A late application might be refused or in some cases a request for a new flight booking, insurance and even new invitation will be required. A request for new documents is likely to increase the handling time further.
The Embassy should handle your application within 15 days (if the application is admissible), counted from when the Embassy has received the application. If an application is not complete or if an interview or document verification is needed the handling time can be extended up to 45 days.
WARNING
The only fee that the applicant should pay when apply for a visa is the application fee and the VFS service fee. Please note that the Embassy of Italy ONLY cooperates with the outsourcing VFS Global. The Embassy of Italy does NOT cooperate with other agents, third parties or individuals who offers visa facilitation services for payment.
If the applicant has been asked to pay extra costs which are not included in the authorized fees by VFS staff, Embassy staff or external agencies/individuals, please notify immediately to: visa.addisabeba@esteri.it (mailto:visa.addisabeba@esteri.it)
visa_types.overview:
Overview
For planned medical treatment, including surgeries (cosmetic or complex). An Italian Visa (or Medical Treatment Visa) is a specific entry permit for foreigners traveling to Italy for medical procedures, hospitalization, and recovery, allowing for longer stays than tourist visas. It's essential for those undergoing complex treatments, cosmetic procedures, or transplants.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
For planned medical treatment, including surgeries (cosmetic or complex). An Italian Visa (or Medical Treatment Visa) is a specific entry permit for foreigners traveling to Italy for medical procedures, hospitalization, and recovery, allowing for longer stays than tourist visas. It's essential for those undergoing complex treatments, cosmetic procedures, or transplants.
                                                                    

## Visa Fees
The Embassy of Italy in Addis Ababa:

[Table:   Business ]
Visa Fees and VFS Service Fees to be paid in Cash / POS at the Cashier counter at the Visa Application Centre before submitting your visa application.

[Table:   Business ]
Applicants will be required to Pay their fees (a deposit of the Embassy Visa Fees) and upon confirmation of the amount payable by the VFS Counter Staff and after completion of document checks, at the Cashier counter at the Visa Application Centre
You must pay the VFS service fee online with a credit or debit card to confirm your appointment.
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee is as per the current exchange rate and it is subject to change. All the fees are non-refundable and non - transferable.
- The Visa Fees are payable only by Cash / POS/ Telebirr in Ethiopian Birr at the Cashier Counter in the Visa Application Centre

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/eth/en/ita/travel-insurance)
Click here to download the list of documents required
Kindly note:
- Personal appearance of applicant is required.
- All documents must be submitted in original as well as in a clear photocopy at the time of making an application.
ALL PASSPORTS MUST BE IN GOOD CONDITIONS. ALTERATED, DAMAGED AND/OR COUNTERFEITED PASSPORTS WITH MISSING PAGES WILL NOT BE ACCEPTED.
PASSPORT MUST HAVE:
- AT LEAST TWO BLANK PAGES
- A VALIDITY PERIOD THAT EXCEEDS OF AT LEAST THREE (3) MONTHS THE DATE OF DEPARTURE FROM THE SCHENGEN AREA

## Photo Specifications
For Photo Specifications click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6cwki7jx1ZTIFwAKGgS8Zh/75e47836a7f8928a9ef04707fdff81b6/Annex-A-Photograph-Guidelines.pdf)

## Processing Time
You need to submit your application in good time before travelling. According to article 9 section 1 in the visa code, EU 2019/1155, you should apply not less than 15 days before the planned visit begins. The 15 days is counted from when the application is received by the Embassy of Italy in Addis Ababa Ethiopia. Consequently, you must calculate with the transportation time when planning for your submission.
A late application might be refused or in some cases a request for a new flight booking, insurance and even new invitation will be required. A request for new documents is likely to increase the handling time further.
The Embassy should handle your application within 15 days (if the application is admissible), counted from when the Embassy has received the application. If an application is not complete or if an interview or document verification is needed the handling time can be extended up to 45 days.
WARNING
The only fee that the applicant should pay when apply for a visa is the application fee and the VFS service fee. Please note that the Embassy of Italy ONLY cooperates with the outsourcing VFS Global. The Embassy of Italy does NOT cooperate with other agents, third parties or individuals who offers visa facilitation services for payment.
If the applicant has been asked to pay extra costs which are not included in the authorized fees by VFS staff, Embassy staff or external agencies/individuals, please notify immediately to: visa.addisabeba@esteri.it (mailto:visa.addisabeba@esteri.it)

## Application Form
Schengen Visa Application form in English
Schengen Visa Application form in Italian (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2qx0y6FAQSrTFad5lFbagk/de55c922ce933e2957d49938725f0ee4/application-form-schengen.pdf) 

APPLICATION FORM
APPLICATION FORMS FOR SCHENGEN VISA C SHALL BE FILLED IN EACH PART, KINDLY INCLUDING A VALID MOBILE PHONE NUMBER AND E-MAIL ADDRESS. 
APPLICATION FORMS SHALL ALWAYS BE DULY SIGNED AND DATED IN ORDER TO BE ACCEPTED. 
INCOMPLETE APPLICATIONS CANNOT BE ACCEPTED AND PROCESSED.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa provides for the temporary stay of persons who will be full-time religious workers in Schengen. Religious work is work of a religious nature for which the applicant has had relevant religious training. The religious work proposed must directly serve an organization’s religious objectives. It would usually be religious work involved in:
- providing spiritual leadership
- conducting worship
- teaching or guidance in religion
- ministering, pastoral care or proselytizing
- other high level specialist work in relation to the above
Your passport must be valid for at least 6 months.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa provides for the temporary stay of persons who will be full-time religious workers in Schengen. Religious work is work of a religious nature for which the applicant has had relevant religious training. The religious work proposed must directly serve an organization’s religious objectives. It would usually be religious work involved in:
- providing spiritual leadership
- conducting worship
- teaching or guidance in religion
- ministering, pastoral care or proselytizing
- other high level specialist work in relation to the above
Your passport must be valid for at least 6 months.

## Photo Specifications
For Photo Specifications click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6cwki7jx1ZTIFwAKGgS8Zh/75e47836a7f8928a9ef04707fdff81b6/Annex-A-Photograph-Guidelines.pdf)

Consequently, you must calculate with the transportation time when planning for your submission.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa allows researchers to visit Schengen during your visa validity period, up to 90 days.
Important: Please note that for Short Term Visa Applications the passport submitted should be at least 6 months valid from the date of travel.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa allows researchers to visit Schengen during your visa validity period, up to 90 days.
Important: Please note that for Short Term Visa Applications the passport submitted should be at least 6 months valid from the date of travel.
                                                                    

## Visa Fees
The Embassy of Italy in Addis Ababa:

[Table:   Business ]
Visa Fees and VFS Service Fees to be paid in Cash / POS at the Cashier counter at the Visa Application Centre before submitting your visa application.

[Table:   Business ]
Applicants will be required to Pay their fees (a deposit of the Embassy Visa Fees) and upon confirmation of the amount payable by the VFS Counter Staff and after completion of document checks, at the Cashier counter at the Visa Application Centre
You must pay the VFS service fee online with a credit or debit card to confirm your appointment.
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee is as per the current exchange rate and it is subject to change. All the fees are non-refundable and non - transferable.
- The Visa Fees are payable only by Cash / POS/ Telebirr in Ethiopian Birr at the Cashier Counter in the Visa Application Centre

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa is issued to applicants to allow them to enter Italy for a short term period of stay, for not more than 90 days and is issued to foreigners who have an economical commercial
                                                                        purpose
visa_types.full_text:

visa_types.visa_fees:
The Embassy of Italy in Addis Ababa:

[Table:   Tourist]
Visa Fees and VFS Service Fees to be paid in Cash / POS at the Cashier counter at the Visa Application Centre before submitting your visa application.

[Table:   Tourist]
How to pay the Visa fees:
Applicants will be required to Pay their fees (a deposit of the Embassy Visa Fees) and upon confirmation of the amount payable by the VFS Counter Staff and after completion of document checks, at the Cashier counter at the Visa Application Centre
You must pay the VFS service fee online with a credit or debit card to confirm your appointment.
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee is as per the current exchange rate and it is subject to change. All the fees are non-refundable and non - transferable.
- The Visa Fees are payable only by Cash / POS/ Telebirr in Ethiopian Birr at the Cashier Counter in the Visa Application Centre
visa_types.processing_time:
You need to submit your application in good time before travelling. According to article 9 section 1 in the visa code, EU 2019/1155, you should apply not less than 15 days before the planned visit begins. The 15 days is counted from when the application is received by the Embassy of Italy in Addis Ababa Ethiopia. Consequently, you must calculate with the transportation time when planning for your submission.
A late application might be refused or in some cases a request for a new flight booking, insurance and even new invitation will be required. A request for new documents is likely to increase the handling time further.
The Embassy should handle your application within 15 days (if the application is admissible), counted from when the Embassy has received the application. If an application is not complete or if an interview or document verification is needed the handling time can be extended up to 45 days.
WARNING
The only fee that the applicant should pay when apply for a visa is the application fee and the VFS service fee. Please note that the Embassy of Italy ONLY cooperates with the outsourcing VFS Global. The Embassy of Italy does NOT cooperate with other agents, third parties or individuals who offers visa facilitation services for payment.
If the applicant has been asked to pay extra costs which are not included in the authorized fees by VFS staff, Embassy staff or external agencies/individuals, please notify immediately to: visa.addisabeba@esteri.it (mailto:visa.addisabeba@esteri.it)
visa_types.overview:
Overview
The visa is issued to people who wish to visit Italy for tourist purposes. It is a short term (type "C") visa - Maximum stay: 90 days.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
The visa is issued to people who wish to visit Italy for tourist purposes. It is a short term (type "C") visa - Maximum stay: 90 days.

## Processing Time

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Long term study visa " D" visa type
A long-term entry visa (for more than 90 days) is called a “National Visa” NV and grants access for a long-term stay in the State that issued it. It allows free circulation for a period of no more than 90 days per half-year in the territory of other Member States.
Note: “D” Type study Visa shall be submitted by applicants only.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Long term study visa " D" visa type
A long-term entry visa (for more than 90 days) is called a “National Visa” NV and grants access for a long-term stay in the State that issued it. It allows free circulation for a period of no more than 90 days per half-year in the territory of other Member States.
Note: “D” Type study Visa shall be submitted by applicants only.

## Visa Fees

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa is for professional and amateur sportspeople, judges and adjudicators who want to come to Italy to participate in their field of sport.
Important: Please note that for Short Term Visa Applications the passport submitted should be at least 6 months valid from the date of travel.
Your visa application must be submitted in the country where you have continuously lived for the last 6 months, and you will need to provide proof of this residence when you apply.
Your passport must be valid for at least 6 months beyond your intended visa duration.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa is for professional and amateur sportspeople, judges and adjudicators who want to come to Italy to participate in their field of sport.
Important: Please note that for Short Term Visa Applications the passport submitted should be at least 6 months valid from the date of travel.
Your visa application must be submitted in the country where you have continuously lived for the last 6 months, and you will need to provide proof of this residence when you apply.
Your passport must be valid for at least 6 months beyond your intended visa duration.
